rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes when the requirement specifies concrete bounds or visible feature names.
Use AGREE logical operators and valid expression syntax for guarantee declarations.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes for assignments.
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions are visible in the component scope.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Declare constants with `const name : type = value;` and equations with `eq name : type = expression;`.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables.
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing constraints
Model fusion and scope insertion rules
